genre_refs: mid-century American storybook / Saturday Evening Post-style Christmas illustration; nostalgic Americana
description: A Christmas slogan graphic from the Department of Labor built over a painted illustration of a snowy small-town winter scene in a mid-20th-century style. The artwork shows a brick rowhouse at night with snow falling; a group of people (a man in a hat carrying a suitcase, a woman, and several children, one holding a basket) walks up a snow-covered path toward an open doorway where a woman in a red dress stands under a lit porch lantern. A snowman, bare winter trees, and a Christmas tree visible through a window are also shown; the palette is deep night-blues with golden window light. A small circular DOL and eagle seal sits at center above the text. Overlaid in large white serif script across the middle is the slogan 'Recapture the Dream.'
